focus: max paddle from above + arms stay splayed horizontal (no droop) + head disappears into mantle

A.hypothesis: MAX PADDLE — big shoulder boost + wider mantle radius

B.hypothesis: ARMS HORIZONTAL — drop-scale down so arms stay splayed, not drooping

C.hypothesis: FULL BLEND — head back matches mantle radius, tilt minimal

D.hypothesis: COMBINE ALL — shoulder boost + horizontal arms + blended head (moderate each)
